items.title: Backtest schema is versioned
items.description: DuckDB schema now contains backtest_request, backtest_run, backtest_trade, and backtest_equity_curve for deterministic replay and detail reads.

items.title: Deterministic backtest bootstrap exists
items.description: A developer can regenerate request/run/trade/equity rows for each READY snapshot from the current screener results.

items.title: Dedicated backtest APIs return detail payloads
items.description: Backend exposes latest/by-id backtest payloads plus trades and equity-curve routes, and app smoke validates the response shape.

items.title: Workbench renders detail APIs
items.description: The frontend workbench reads latest snapshot, screener, stock detail, and backtest detail APIs to render a richer v1.0 research shell.
